'''Valsil Torr''' was an elderly [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] merchant who controlled operations on [[Yag-prime]]. After an encounter with the ex-members of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], he and his men surrendered and allowed them to remove the [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] being stored onboard the [[Space station/Legends|station]] by [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]. He was killed when a [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] maintenance worker "accidentally" put a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolt-sized hole in an exterior wall of the station manager's office, causing him to suffer from explosive decompression. The Givin, who could survive in vacuum for limited periods of time, coolly patched up the wall.
